title: Dashboard Done today omits completed issues
description: The Symphony dashboard has a Done today listing defined in SPEC.md, but issues that reach a terminal/completed state do not appear there. Reproduce the dashboard behavior first, then fix the implementation so recently completed issues are visible in the Done today section without interfering with existing Symphony runners.
acceptance_criteria: 1. A regression test proves a completed issue appears in the dashboard Done today listing. 2. The implementation matches the SPEC.md dashboard behavior for completed-today items. 3. Validation uses Beads by creating a temporary test ticket, completing it, and verifying it appears in Done today. 4. Any Symphony run used for validation is scoped to this bug label and uses isolated workspaces/logs/ports so it does not interfere with existing Symphony runners.
notes:
Reproduced on 2026-07-15 with closed Beads test ticket SYM-kw8 (label symphony-dashboard-repro-only). Started isolated Symphony using .symphony/repro-done-today.WORKFLOW.md, workspace root .symphony/repro-workspaces, logs .symphony/repro-logs, ephemeral status port. Startup cleanup logged closed SYM-kw8, but GET /api/v1/state returned counts.completed=0 and completed=[]; Done today therefore renders empty. Fix should ensure completed-today terminal Beads issues that Symphony observes during startup/status are represented in the dashboard completed rows, while preserving in-memory worker completion rows and avoiding interference with active runners.
Main checkout validation on 2026-07-15: created and closed Beads ticket SYM-sfq with label symphony-dashboard-validation-main, ran ./go/symphony using .symphony/validate-main-done-today.WORKFLOW.md with isolated logs/workspaces and port 0, and verified GET /api/v1/state returned completed=[SYM-sfq] with completion_reason=terminal_tracker_state and counts.completed=1. Validation server was stopped after the check.
close_reason: Implemented dashboard Done today terminal issue import; make all passed; live Beads validation showed scoped closed issue SYM-wisp-azq in /api/v1/state completed rows.

title: Symphony Codex smoke test
description: Smoke-test the Symphony Codex workflow. In the isolated workspace only, create .symphony/smoke/processed.txt containing: processed by Symphony Codex. Do not change tracked source files. After creating the proof file, close this Beads issue with reason: Symphony Codex smoke processed.
acceptance_criteria: The issue is processed by Symphony, the workspace contains .symphony/smoke/processed.txt with the exact text, and the Beads issue is closed.

title: Configure Codex sandbox for Beads and Git
description: Allow Symphony Codex agents to use repo-shared Beads state and routine Git operations from workspace-write sessions.
close_reason: Configured WORKFLOW.md to pass Codex workspace-write sandbox roots for repo Beads state, repo Git metadata, generated workspaces, and network access; global ~/.codex rule changes were intentionally not applied after security review.

title: Validation ticket for Symphony Done today dashboard
description: Temporary validation ticket for Done today dashboard import. Created and closed by Codex on 2026-07-15.
acceptance_criteria: Closed ticket appears in Symphony /api/v1/state completed rows.
close_reason: Done today dashboard validation ticket completed for local Symphony verification.

title: Dashboard Done today repro ticket
description: Temporary closed Beads ticket for reproducing whether Symphony dashboard Done today includes tickets completed today.
